description: A residential customer wants to sign up for a local community solar program to support renewable energy and receive bill credits.

nodes.task_description: Based on the customer's address, identify available community solar projects with open subscriptions.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds one local solar farm with 10 remaining subscription slots.

nodes.task_description: Explain the program's terms, including the subscription fee and the estimated monthly bill credit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the costs and benefits.

nodes.task_description: Process the customer's subscription application and sign them up for a 5 kW share of the project.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully enrolls the customer in the program.
